About.title: Casita Ixchel is your choice for a perfect vacation in the arms of nature
About.p1: Casita Ixchel, ideally located just 10 minutes from the Cenote Route, has become a true symbol of natural connection and comfort in the middle of the jungle.
About.p2: Our unique spaces with panoramic windows offer breathtaking views of the tropical flora, creating an unparalleled atmosphere of tranquility and peace.

Amenities.label: AMENITIES
Amenities.title: Everything you need in the jungle

Experiences.label: TAILORED EXPERIENCES
Experiences.title: What kind of traveler are you?
Experiences.divers_desc: "A step away from the best cenotes in Quintana Roo."
Experiences.couples_desc: "Total privacy for a romantic escape under the stars."
Experiences.nature_desc: "Exotic bird watching from your own terrace."
Experiences.solitary_desc: "The silence you need to create, read, or just BE."

Rooms.label: COZY HOME
Rooms.title: Our cozy rooms are always ready for you
Rooms.desc: Modern rustic design, spacious areas, and utmost privacy. All this makes your vacation an unforgettable experience.
